tests_added: test_header_pragma_once - Verify header has #pragma once (repo style)
test_no_trailing_whitespace_in_target - Check no trailing whitespace in modified file
test_no_tabs_in_target - Verify spaces instead of tabs in modified file
test_curly_brace_style - Basic curly brace style check
p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 4 pass-to-pass tests that verify ClickHouse repo style guidelines on the modified ObjectStorageQueue files. These checks run the same validations as the repo's CI but focused only on the relevant files to avoid pre-existing issues in the rest of the codebase. Style checks include: header pragma, trailing whitespace, tabs vs spaces, and basic brace formatting.
